DEF MOTION TO CONTINUE PC1050 - FILED

/CAL:APD MTR FILING/INTC/X:SPANISH INTERPRETER, SANDRA BARNES PRESENT/MTR-DA-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:06-22-22/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO ATTEND 10 PARENTING CLASSES/ /X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THEDEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT FOR 30 DAYS/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THEAPD/CTORD: APD WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANTPRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/PROB EXT:12-12-24/CONTD:DV PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:APD/

/CAL:APD MTR FILING/INTC/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:EAN VIZZI/VD:DV PROGRESS REPORT/09    CTSAPD MTR/WIAMTR/S50/PROB ADM REV/SHER/BAIL:10,000/CONTD:TO TRAIL 21007462 IN DEPT 20/DOP/

/TWS/CH8 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 23D/CTS 23/IND/DOMVF1 500/DOMV2 52 WEEK/COMUN 25RESTV/X:INCLUDES RESTITUTION AND STAY AWAY ORDERS FROM DISMISSED COUNTS (HARVEY WAIVER)/SA1:ANGELES REYES/SATERM/SA2:A WHITE VAN (CA LIC #63523E1)LOCATED AT 1383 ARMSTRONG AVE,, SF/VF2:150/WEAP/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/REMA/INTC/CONTD:DOMESTIC VIOLENCE COURT/DOP/
